Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: We've been seeing all of these diplomats testify on Capitol Hill.

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: Mick Mulvaney really tried to minimize what we've been hearing from them,

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: but it was interesting how he tried to do it.

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: He tried to do it by kind of not remembering most of their names.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: And I can never remember the gentleman who testified was McKinney.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: The guy, is that his name?

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: I can't remember the person's name.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: I'm sorry, I don't know who that is.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Is that somebody who testified this week?

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: I don't believe I've ever talked to anybody named George Kent in my life.

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: I have to say, does he need a better role at X or...

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: I mean, first of all, you called him out on it,

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: but it's quite obvious what he is trying to do, which is...

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: I wouldn't pick them out of London.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: And he was trying to say, it's not relevant.

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: The president says, I don't even know that person.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: He's trying to diminish these people.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: But then you could flip that and say, well, shouldn't...

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: The White House Chief of Staff know a high-ranking official

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: These are points you should make.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: I mean, I would make that if you are at that level,

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: you should actually know the people.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Sure, responsible for making US politics.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Right. You can turn that on its head.

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: You said there's a problem with him making.

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: You were going to say something.

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: I thought it was interesting how...

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: When we learned this G7 part of things...

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: That he's going to host the G7 at his club, right?

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: Which we knew was a possibility, but it's very...

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: I don't know if it's surprising,

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: It is certainly a breach of protocol, right?

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: I don't mean to go off in this tangent about that,

Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: because it actually sort of speaks to the broad thing

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: There's a shame factor that has been missing.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: That chip has just been missing since day one,

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: and that has been the through line of all of these issues

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: What did McMulvaney say to the question about...

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Are you concerned about what this says to foreign leaders

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Around the world who looked to this country as sort of a beacon?

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: You know what his answer was?

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: So dealing is not in the vocabularies.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Self-dealing is not in the vocabulary,

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: and what Mulvaney was saying is, look, if we do it, it's just fine.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: This is the best place in the entire United States,

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: and thought it was a great idea.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: And again, it goes back to what Dana was saying,

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: which is, yes, we're doing it.
